content.text: {"utterances":["The yellow sphere that is not the upper one.","The small yellow sphere closest to the large green cube.","The leftmost yellow sphere.","The yellow sphere not near the small green cube.","The yellow sphere on the listener's left side of the scene.","The lower yellow sphere.","The yellow sphere just beside the large green cube, not the pyramid.","The bottommost yellow sphere."]}

request_hash_payload.system: You are the SPEAKER in a situated reference game. Write short natural-language messages that help a listener identify the target object. Use only listener-visible information, never mention the hidden target ID, and never use exact row or column coordinates. Return valid JSON only.
request_hash_payload.user:
Scene:
{
  "listener_orientation": "east",
  "listener_view_text": "Scene ps_000003. You face east.\nRows increase from top to bottom; columns increase from left to right.\nCandidate objects:\n- obj_5: small green cube at row 2, column 3\n- obj_2: small yellow sphere at row 1, column 4\n- obj_1: small yellow sphere at row 4, column 1\n- obj_3: large green cube at row 4, column 2\n- obj_4: small orange pyramid at row 5, column 5",
  "objects": [
    {
      "color": "green",
      "column": 3,

      "row": 2,

      "size": "small",

    },
    {

      "row": 1,

      "size": "large",

      "row": 5,
      "shape": "pyramid",
      "size": "small",
      "visible_to_listener": true
    }
  ],
  "scenario_type": "perspective_shift",
  "scene_id": "ps_000003",
  "speaker_orientation": "north",
  "speaker_view_text": "Scene ps_000003 (perspective_shift).\nYou face north; the listener faces east.\nRows increase from top to bottom; columns increase from left to right.\nVisible objects:\n- obj_5: small green cube at row 2, column 3\n- obj_2: small yellow sphere at row 1, column 4\n- obj_1: small yellow sphere at row 4, column 1\n- obj_3: large green cube at row 4, column 2\n- obj_4: small orange pyramid at row 5, column 5"
}

Target object ID visible only to you: obj_1
Target object non-coordinate attributes visible to you: {"color": "yellow", "shape": "sphere", "size": "small"}

Generate exactly 8 different non-coordinate messages. Do not write phrases like "row 4", "column 1", "fourth row", or "first column". Do not mention object IDs.
Use diverse strategies in this order when possible:
1. A contrastive attribute description.
2. A landmark-relative description using listener-visible objects.
3. An ordinal description such as topmost, bottommost, leftmost, or rightmost.
4. A negative contrast such as not the one near another object.
5. A listener-frame-safe spatial description.
6. A concise fallback without coordinates.
7. A second relational description with a different landmark.
8. A second contrastive or ordinal description.
Each message should be at most 25 words.
Return exactly this JSON shape: {"utterances": ["...", "..."]}
